_readme: Three streams: cardio_genomics (CHD+DCM), genomic_methods (disease-agnostic methodology), ai_genomics (AI/ML in genomics & cardiovascular). Queries use PubMed field tags ([tiab], [mh]); preprints (Europe PMC) reuse the same Boolean with tags stripped. Tune recall with `queries`, precision with `relevance_threshold`. `interest_profile` is only used if you opt into the LLM pass (use_llm:true).
interest_profile: I am a cardiovascular genomics researcher. Core interests: (1) the genetics/genomics of congenital heart disease (CHD) and dilated cardiomyopathy (DCM) - gene discovery, rare and de novo variants, exome/genome sequencing, burden, and multi-omics in these conditions; (2) statistical and computational METHODS for genomic studies regardless of disease - rare-variant association and burden testing, polygenic risk scores (PRS/PGS), GWAS methodology, multi-trait methods (e.g. MTAG), fine-mapping, genetic correlation, heritability, Mendelian randomization and related tools; (3) advances in artificial intelligence / machine learning applied to genomics and cardiovascular disease - deep learning for variant-effect/pathogenicity prediction, foundation and large language models for genomics, and ML for genomic prediction. I want primary research and methods papers. NOT interested in: purely clinical/surgical-outcome or imaging studies with no genomics, animal-only work with no human relevance, drug trials, or generic AI with no genomics/cardiovascular link.

CHD_Genomics.description: Genetics / genomics of congenital heart disease
queries: ("congenital heart disease"[tiab] OR "congenital heart defect"[tiab] OR "congenital heart defects"[tiab] OR "Heart Defects, Congenital"[mh]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR exome[tiab] OR "whole genome"[tiab] OR "de novo"[tiab] OR "rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab] OR mutation*[tiab] OR "copy number"[tiab] OR GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide"[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab] OR methylation[tiab] OR transcriptom*[tiab] OR multi-omics[tiab])

("dilated cardiomyopathy"[tiab] OR "Cardiomyopathy, Dilated"[mh]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR exome[tiab] OR "rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab] OR "truncating variant"[tiab] OR titin[tiab] OR TTN[tiab] OR mutation*[tiab] OR GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide"[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab] OR "polygenic"[tiab] OR methylation[tiab] OR transcriptom*[tiab] OR multi-omics[tiab])

RareVariant_Burden.description: Rare-variant association, burden / gene-based testing methods
queries: ("rare variant"[tiab] OR "rare variants"[tiab]) AND (burden[tiab] OR "gene-based"[tiab] OR collapsing[tiab] OR aggregation[tiab] OR SKAT[tiab] OR "association test"[tiab] OR "association testing"[tiab]) AND (method*[tiab] OR test[tiab] OR framework[tiab] OR statistic*[tiab] OR genome[tiab] OR exome[tiab])

("polygenic risk score"[tiab] OR "polygenic score"[tiab] OR "polygenic scores"[tiab] OR PRS[tiab] OR PGS[tiab]) AND (method*[tiab] OR model*[tiab] OR construct*[tiab] OR develop*[tiab] OR portab*[tiab] OR transferab*[tiab] OR "cross-ancestry"[tiab] OR "cross-population"[tiab] OR calibrat*[tiab] OR benchmark*[tiab])

GWAS_MultiTrait_FineMapping.description: GWAS methodology, multi-trait (MTAG), fine-mapping, genetic correlation
queries: (MTAG[tiab] OR "multi-trait"[tiab] OR "cross-trait"[tiab] OR "genetic correlation"[tiab] OR "fine-mapping"[tiab] OR "fine mapping"[tiab] OR colocali*[tiab] OR "LD score"[tiab] OR heritability[tiab] OR "mixed model"[tiab]) AND (GWAS[tiab] OR "genome-wide association"[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR polygenic[tiab] OR method*[tiab])

AI_in_Genomics.description: Machine learning / AI applied to genomics
queries: ("machine learning"[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab] OR "artificial intelligence"[tiab] OR "neural network"[tiab] OR "neural networks"[tiab] OR transformer*[tiab] OR "foundation model"[tiab] OR "foundation models"[tiab] OR "large language model"[tiab]) AND (genom*[tiab] OR "rare variant"[tiab] OR "variant effect"[tiab] OR "variant classification"[tiab] OR pathogenicity[tiab] OR "polygenic"[tiab] OR sequencing[tiab] OR regulatory[tiab] OR splicing[tiab])

AI_in_Cardiovascular_Genetics.description: Machine learning / AI at the intersection of cardiovascular disease and genetics
queries: ("machine learning"[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab] OR "artificial intelligence"[tiab] OR "neural network"[tiab]) AND ("congenital heart"[tiab] OR cardiomyopathy[tiab] OR cardiovascular[tiab] OR cardiac[tiab]) AND (genetic*[tiab] OR genom*[tiab] OR variant*[tiab] OR "polygenic"[tiab])
